text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I found a vending machine earlier that sells
mystery drinks...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It was so intriguing, I just had to try one. But now
my body's been feeling weird ever since!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I don't even know how to describe how I feel! I'm
kind of hot, but also cold? And it sort of hurts
too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week continues to feel generally unwell
for a while...
